word: G4848 - συμπορεύομαι - symporeúomai - soom-por-yoo'-om-ahee - Go with

sections.paragraph:
- Original: συμπορεύομαι

- Transliteration: Sumporeuomai

- Phonetic: soom-por-yoo'-om-ahee

- Definition:

1. to go or journey together

2. to come together, to assemble

- Origin: from G4862 and G4198

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G4862 and G4198; to journey together; by implication to assemble: - go with resort.
